top_signals.title: Three Indian Sailors Die After US Strike Tanker off Oman
top_signals.summary: All three missing Indian seafarers have died after a U.S. military strike on a tanker in the Gulf of Oman, Indian Shipping Minister Sarbananda Sonowal said on Thursday.The U.S. said its military carried out a "precision" strike on the vessel…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: BlackRock's income-paying bitcoin ETF nears launch at a fee that undercuts rivals
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Piero Cipollone: Europe’s money evolves so people’s freedom to pay remains
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Why Indonesia’s Rupiah Keeps Hitting Record Lows
top_signals.summary: Indonesia’s rupiah — Asia’s worst-performing currency this year — has been under pressure since late 2024 when investors began reassessing the country’s fiscal outlook following the election of President Prabowo Subianto. Before this current period of volatility, the currency hadn’t traded at such weak levels since the Asian Financial Crisis of 1997-98.

top_signals.title: Beijing’s investment clampdown clouds outlook for Hong Kong banks and insurers
top_signals.summary: Analysts and financial executives say China's crackdown could in the near term weigh on money flows to Hong Kong due to concerns about greater scrutiny of capital outflows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
